headline: Spain clinches second World Cup win after Argentina disappoints in final
description: Spanish dominance challenged Argentina's tactical plan. La Roja broke through in extra time to secure a 1-0 victory.

US launches ninth night of strikes on Iran as it hits out at Gulf neighbors
description: Early on Monday, Iran's Revolutionary Guards said they had launched a 'surprise attack' on an 'enemy command center' in Syria. This fresh round of violence comes after three new US military fatalities were announced, as hope for a political settlement to end the war has dimmed.

headline: German MP leader forced to resign after becoming a father via surrogacy
description: Jens Spahn, the chair of the CDU/CSU group in the Bundestag, admitted having underestimated the impact of his decision, as surrogacy remains banned in Germany and his party is staunchly opposed to it.

headline: Arthur Jafa transforms the African-American experience into visual poetry
description: He had to wait until he was 55 to find success. A decade later, Arthur Jafa has become an artist whose work is shown around the world. His videos have a powerful sensory and emotional impact, weaving an African-American narrative shaped by violence and resilience.

headline: Far-right Nigel Farage faces an unlikely opponent: Count Binface
description: The leader of the far-right party resigned his seat as MP in an attempt to distract from investigations into his party's donors, but he now faces an unlikely opponent: Count Binface.

headline: The cinematic and audiovisual influence of Homer's 'Odyssey,' from Méliès to Godard
description: Homer's ancient Greek epic poem has fueled the imaginations of countless filmmakers, giving rise to a multitude of adaptations, from sword-and-sandal epics to parodies, adult films and even Italian Westerns.

headline: Alexander Skarsgård, a daring actor
description: The 49-year-old Swedish actor plays a gay, dominant biker in 'Pillion.' It's an unexpected role for Skarsgård, who is known for Hollywood blockbusters but is determined not to be typecast as a conventional heartthrob.
